allow: Bash(ollama.exe --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no ollama"; pip --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no pip")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.llm.chat_service import get_chat_model

async def test\(\):
    llm = get_chat_model\('groq-llama3-8b'\)
    resp = await llm.ainvoke\([{'role':'user','content':'say hi in 3 words'}]\)
    print\('SUCCESS:', resp.content\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.core.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\('GROQ key:', repr\(s.GROQ_API_KEY[:15]+'...' if s.GROQ_API_KEY else 'EMPTY'\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.llm.chat_service import get_chat_model
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage

async def test\(\):
    llm = get_chat_model\('gemini-2.0-flash'\)
    resp = await llm.ainvoke\([HumanMessage\(content='say hello in 5 words'\)]\)
    print\('SUCCESS:', resp.content\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import asyncio, httpx, base64
from urllib.parse import quote

async def test\(\):
    prompt = 'a person sitting on car'
    url = f'https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/{quote\(prompt\)}?width=512&height=512'
    print\('URL:', url\)
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=120.0, follow_redirects=True\) as client:
        r = await client.get\(url\)
        print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
        print\('Content-Type:', r.headers.get\('content-type'\)\)
        print\('Size:', len\(r.content\)\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import asyncio, httpx
from urllib.parse import quote

async def test\(\):
    prompts = [
        'beautiful sunset over mountains',
        'a cute cat',
        'cyberpunk city at night',
        'a person sitting on car'
    ]
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=120.0, follow_redirects=True\) as client:
        for p in prompts:
            url = f'https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/{quote\(p\)}?width=256&height=256'
            r = await client.get\(url\)
            print\(f'{p:40s} -> status={r.status_code} size={len\(r.content\)}'\)
asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
